articles.title: Lakers Stifle Rockets in Game 3, Take 3‑0 Series Lead
articles.original_title: Lakers vs. Rockets Game 3 score, highlights: LA puts Houston in deep hole - USA Today
articles.summary: Los Angeles defeated Houston in Game 3, pushing the series to a 3‑0 advantage. The win deepened the Rockets' deficit and gave the Lakers control of the series heading back to Los Angeles.
key_points: Lakers won Game 3, extending their lead to 3‑0 in the first‑round series.
Houston struggled offensively, falling into a deep hole in the series.
The victory puts the Lakers in a commanding position as the series shifts to LA.

articles.title: Marcus Smart Powers Lakers to 3‑0 Lead Over Rockets
articles.original_title: Marcus Smart leads Lakers to commanding 3-0 lead over Rockets in playoff series - Los Angeles Times
articles.summary: Marcus Smart delivered a standout performance, helping the Lakers secure a commanding 3‑0 series lead against the Rockets. The win solidified Los Angeles' dominance early in the playoffs.
key_points: Smart contributed key scoring and playmaking in the victory.
Lakers now lead the series 3‑0, putting the Rockets on the brink of elimination.
The performance highlighted the Lakers' depth and defensive intensity.

articles.title: NBA Champion Issues 3‑Word Message After Rockets' Game 3 Collapse
articles.original_title: NBA Champion Sends 3-Word Message Doubling Down on Viral Criticism of Rockets After Game 3 Collapse to Lakers - PFSN
articles.summary: Following the Rockets' loss in Game 3, an NBA champion posted a three‑word statement that echoed viral criticism of Houston's play. The brief message underscored the frustration surrounding the Rockets' performance.
key_points: The three‑word comment amplified existing criticism of the Rockets.
The message was posted after the team's collapse in Game 3.
It reflected broader disappointment with Houston's execution in the series.

articles.title: Three Takeaways From the Lakers' Inspired Game 3 Win
articles.original_title: 3 Takeaways From an Inspired Game 3 Win for Lakers Over Rockets - Sports Illustrated
articles.summary: Sports Illustrated broke down the key factors behind Los Angeles' decisive Game 3 victory over Houston. The analysis highlighted strategic adjustments, defensive execution, and contributions from role players.
key_points: Lakers' defensive scheme limited the Rockets' scoring opportunities.
Bench players provided crucial scoring and energy.
Coaching adjustments at halftime shifted momentum in LA's favor.

articles.title: Key Takeaways From Lakers’ Game 3 Triumph in Houston
articles.original_title: 3 takeaways from Lakers’ Game 3 win vs. Rockets
articles.summary: After defending home court in the first two games, the Lakers traveled to Houston and secured a pivotal Game 3 win despite the Rockets missing Kevin Durant. The victory emphasized Los Angeles' resilience and strategic execution.
key_points: Rockets played without Kevin Durant, impacting their offensive firepower.
Lakers capitalized on the absence, executing a balanced attack.
The win gave LA a 3‑0 series lead and momentum heading back to the Staples Center.

articles.title: Spurs Take 2-1 Series Lead Without Wembanyama
articles.original_title: No Wemby, no problem: 3 takeaways from the Spurs' Game 3 win over the Trail Blazers
articles.summary: The San Antonio Spurs captured a 2-1 advantage over the Portland Trail Blazers in Game 3 despite missing star Victor Wembanyama. The win highlighted the team's depth and ability to execute without their rookie superstar.
key_points: Spurs won Game 3, moving ahead 2-1 in the first‑round series.
Victor Wembanyama was out, but the team still performed at a high level.
The victory underscored San Antonio’s depth and coaching adjustments.

articles.title: Harper Sparks Spurs’ Come‑From‑Behind Win Over Trail Blazers
articles.original_title: Spurs come from 15 down in second half to beat Trail Blazers 120-108, take 2-1 series lead
articles.summary: Rookie Dylan Harper ignited a second‑half surge as the Spurs erased a 15‑point deficit to beat Portland 120‑108, taking a 2‑1 series lead. The performance came without Victor Wembanyama, showing the young guard’s emerging impact.
key_points: Spurs rallied from 15 down in the second half to win 120‑108.
Dylan Harper led the comeback with key scoring and energy.
The win gave San Antonio a 2‑1 edge in the series despite Wembanyama’s absence.

articles.title: Spurs Hold 2‑1 Edge Heading Into Game 4 vs. Trail Blazers
articles.original_title: Spurs take 2-1 lead into game 4 against the Trail Blazers
articles.summary: San Antonio (62‑20) maintains a 2‑1 series lead over Portland (42‑40) as the first‑round matchup heads into Game 4. The Spurs are favored by 5.5 points, with the total set at 219.
key_points: Series standing: Spurs lead 2‑1 over the Trail Blazers.
Betting line: Spurs –5.5, over/under 219.
Spurs sit second in the Western Conference, Trail Blazers are the eighth seed.

articles.title: Lakers Aim to Close Out Rockets in First‑Round Game 4
articles.original_title: James and the Lakers look to clinch series against Houston
articles.summary: Holding a 3‑0 series lead, the Los Angeles Lakers (53‑29) look to clinch the first‑round series against the Houston Rockets (52‑30) on Sunday night. The Rockets are listed as 5.5‑point favorites, with the game total set at 207.
key_points: Lakers lead the series 3‑0 and seek a sweep of the Rockets.
Betting line shows Rockets –5.5, over/under 207.
Both teams are closely matched in the regular season standings, fourth and fifth in the West.

articles.title: Cavaliers Take 2‑1 Series Lead Over Raptors
articles.original_title: Cleveland takes 2-1 lead into game 4 against Toronto
articles.summary: The Cleveland Cavaliers (52‑30) moved ahead 2‑1 in their first‑round series against the Toronto Raptors (46‑36) as the matchup heads into Game 4. The Cavaliers are favored by 3.5 points, with the total set at 220.5.
key_points: Cavaliers lead the series 2‑1 against Toronto.
Betting line: Cavaliers –3.5, over/under 220.5.
Both teams are in the Eastern Conference playoffs, with Cleveland holding the fourth seed.

articles.title: 2026 NBA Playoff Bracket: First‑Round Matchups Begin
articles.original_title: 2026 NBA playoff bracket: Matchups, schedule with first round underway
articles.summary: The 2026 NBA playoffs have started, featuring eight first‑round series across the league. The bracket outlines each matchup and the schedule for the opening round of games.
key_points: Eight first‑round series are underway.
CBS Sports provides the full playoff bracket and game dates.
All teams are competing for a path to the conference semifinals.

articles.title: Victor Wembanyama Out After Concussion, Misses Game 3 vs. Trail Blazers
articles.original_title: Victor Wembanyama injury update: Spurs star (concussion protocol) misses Game 3 vs. Trail Blazers
articles.summary: San Antonio's rookie Victor Wembanyama traveled to Portland but was ruled out of Game 3 after entering concussion protocol following a head injury in Game 2. His absence leaves the Spurs without their star for the crucial third contest.
key_points: Wembanyama suffered a concussion in Game 2.
He was placed in concussion protocol and did not play in Game 3.
Spurs must adjust their lineup without their top prospect.

articles.title: Jayson Tatum Scores 25 as Celtics Take 2‑1 Lead Over 76ers
articles.original_title: Tatum shines with 25 points as Celtics take 2-1 series lead over 76ers
articles.summary: Returning from injury, Jayson Tatum poured in 25 points, matching Jaylen Brown’s 25, to help Boston defeat Philadelphia 108‑100 and move ahead 2‑1 in the Eastern Conference first round. Game 4 is scheduled for Sunday in Philadelphia.
key_points: Tatum and Brown each scored 25 points.
Celtics win 108‑100, leading series 2‑1.
Game 4 will be played Sunday in Philadelphia.

articles.title: Spurs Rally Past Trail Blazers 120‑108 Without Wembanyama
articles.original_title: Spurs beat Trail Blazers 120-108 without Wembanyama to take 2-1 series lead
articles.summary: Despite missing Victor Wembanyama, San Antonio advanced to a 2‑1 series lead as Stephon Castle erupted for 33 points and Dylan Harper added 27 and 10 rebounds. The Spurs erased a 15‑point third‑quarter deficit to secure the win.
key_points: Stephon Castle led with 33 points.
Dylan Harper contributed 27 points and 10 rebounds.
Spurs overcame a 15‑point third‑quarter hole to win 120‑108.

articles.title: LeBron James Delivers ‘Everything’ in Game 3 Win Over Rockets
articles.original_title: LeBron James promised the Lakers 'everything' and delivered in spectacular fashion in Game 3 win over Rockets
articles.summary: At 41, LeBron James produced another standout playoff performance, helping the Los Angeles Lakers secure a victory over the Houston Rockets in Game 3. The win highlighted James’s continued ability to impact high‑stakes games.
key_points: LeBron, age 41, led the Lakers to a Game 3 win.
Performance added to his extensive playoff highlight reel.
Victory moves the Lakers forward in the series against Houston.

articles.title: LeBron Powers Lakers to 3‑0 Lead Over Rockets
articles.original_title: Luka Doncic Reacts as LeBron James Leads Lakers to 3-0 Lead Over Rockets - heavy.com
articles.summary: The Los Angeles Lakers took a 3‑0 series advantage against the Houston Rockets, highlighted by a dominant performance from LeBron James. The win was noted by Dallas Mavericks star Luka Doncic, who reacted to the Lakers’ surge on social media.
key_points: Lakers clinched a 3‑0 lead in the playoff series.
LeBron James delivered a standout performance, leading the team offensively and defensively.
Luka Doncic publicly commented on the Lakers’ dominance.

articles.title: LeBron’s “Assist of the Night” Earns NBA Spotlight
articles.original_title: Assist of the Night: LeBron James - Apr. 24 - NBA
articles.summary: LeBron James was highlighted by the NBA for delivering the “Assist of the Night” on April 24, showcasing his playmaking ability in a critical moment of the Lakers’ postseason run. The play contributed to a key scoring opportunity that helped secure the win.
key_points: LeBron’s pass was selected as the NBA’s top assist of the night.
The assist set up a decisive basket in the game’s closing stages.
It underscored James’ continued impact as a facilitator in the playoffs.

articles.title: LeBron Leads Lakers to Overtime Victory as Stars Sit Out
articles.original_title: LeBron James Wows Fans in Lakers OT Win vs. Rockets in Game 3 with Luka, KD, Reaves Out - Bleacher Report
articles.summary: With Luka Doncic, Kevin Durant and Austin Reaves unavailable, LeBron James stepped up to guide the Lakers to an overtime win over the Rockets in Game 3. His performance kept Los Angeles on the brink of a series sweep.
key_points: LeBron carried the Lakers in the absence of several key opponents.
The game went to overtime, where the Lakers prevailed.
The win moved the series to 3‑0 in favor of Los Angeles.

articles.title: LeBron James Saves Lakers in OT Thriller, Pushes Rockets to Brink
articles.original_title: LeBron James rescues Lakers in overtime thriller and pushes Rockets to brink - The Guardian
articles.summary: In a dramatic overtime finish, LeBron James rescued the Lakers, delivering clutch scoring and defensive plays that forced the Rockets into a must‑win situation. The victory also saw Marcus Smart join James in breaking NBA playoff records.
key_points: LeBron’s late‑game heroics secured an overtime win.
Both James and Marcus Smart set new playoff records during the game.
The Rockets now face elimination, needing to win the next two games.

articles.title: LeBron Delivers ‘Everything’ in Game 3 Win Over Rockets
articles.original_title: LeBron James promised the Lakers 'everything' and delivered in spectacular fashion in Game 3 win over Rockets - CBS Sports
articles.summary: True to his promise, LeBron James delivered a spectacular performance that propelled the Lakers to a Game 3 victory against Houston. His all‑around effort cemented the Lakers’ 3‑0 series lead.
key_points: LeBron fulfilled his pledge by delivering a dominant all‑around game.
The win gave the Lakers a commanding 3‑0 lead in the series.
His performance featured high scoring, rebounds, assists, and key defensive stops.

articles.title: NBA World Reacts to LeBron's Lakers‑Rockets Performance
articles.original_title: NBA World Reacts To LeBron James’ Performance In Lakers-Rockets Game - heavy.com
articles.summary: LeBron James' effort in the Lakers' 112‑108 win over the Rockets sparked a wave of commentary across the league and media. Analysts praised his scoring and leadership while also noting areas for improvement as the series heads toward a potential elimination game.
key_points: LeBron finished with a high‑scoring line that helped seal a narrow victory.
Reactions highlighted his clutch play but questioned defensive consistency.
The performance set the tone for a decisive Game 4 for Houston.

articles.title: LeBron James Discusses Lakers' 112‑108 Win in Post‑Game Interview
articles.original_title: LAL 112, HOU 108: LeBron James Postgame Media Availability - NBA
articles.summary: Following the 112‑108 victory over Houston, LeBron James addressed the media, emphasizing the team's resilience and the importance of executing in close games. He also spoke about the upcoming challenges and the need for continued focus.
key_points: James credited the team's defensive adjustments for the win.
He stressed the significance of staying aggressive on both ends of the floor.
LeBron warned that the Rockets will be dangerous in Game 4.

articles.title: LeBron Sets New NBA Milestones in Game 3 Thriller
articles.original_title: LeBron James Makes More NBA History in Lakers-Rockets Game 3 Thriller - heavy.com
articles.summary: In the 112‑108 Game 3 win, LeBron James added several entries to the NBA record books, further cementing his legacy. The milestones included moving up on the all‑time scoring list and achieving a rare combination of points, rebounds, and assists in a playoff game.
key_points: LeBron surpassed a key career scoring threshold.
He joined an exclusive club of players with 30+ points, 10+ rebounds, and 5+ assists in a playoff win.
The historic night helped the Lakers take a 2‑1 series lead.

articles.title: LeBron Sends Clear Message About Game 3's Meaning for Bronny
articles.original_title: LeBron James sends abundantly clear message about what Game 3 means for Bronny James - Lake Show Life
articles.summary: After the Lakers' Game 3 victory, LeBron James addressed the significance of the win for his son, Bronny, who is preparing to enter the NBA. He highlighted the importance of work ethic, preparation, and handling pressure as lessons for the younger James.
key_points: LeBron linked his playoff experience to advice for Bronny's upcoming draft year.
He emphasized the value of consistency and mental toughness.
The comments underscored the personal dimension of the postseason for the James family.

articles.title: Four Takeaways from Lakers‑Rockets Game 3
articles.original_title: 4 takeaways: Lakers-Rockets Game 3 leaves Houston on the brink of elimination - NBA
articles.summary: An analysis of Game 3 identified four critical insights: the Lakers' ability to close out tight games, Houston's defensive lapses, LeBron's continued dominance, and the Rockets facing elimination pressure. These points outline the series trajectory heading into Game 4.
key_points: Lakers demonstrated clutch execution in the final minutes.
The Rockets' defensive rotations were a major factor in the loss.
LeBron's performance remains the decisive factor for Los Angeles.
Houston now faces a must‑win situation to avoid elimination.
